Uses of Enum
com.zendesk.maxwell.CaseSensitivity

Packages that use CaseSensitivity
Package
Description
com.zendesk.maxwell
top level classes concerned with instantiating and running a Maxwell replicator.
com.zendesk.maxwell.recovery
allows users to continue a stream after changing masters
com.zendesk.maxwell.schema
stores and updates (via SQL parsing) a view of the mysql schema

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    CaseSensitivity
    Describes the 3 difference case sensitivity settings on a Mysql server.
